heading: We had a high level of participation
subtitle: We received 140 responses from across the movement including, clubs, staff, committees, and reference groups. Feedback was gathered through an online survey, supported by drop-in sessions at Nationals in Ōhope, and scheduled sessions both in-person and online with SLSNZ leadership.

insights.title: 72 of 74 clubs
insights.text: Every region of the movement was represented.

insights.title: 52 staff
insights.text: Feedback came from across the organisation - from the ELT through to individual contributors.
